---
name: Whiteboard feature request
about: Suggest a whiteboard feature or improvement
title: "Feature request: "
labels: enhancement, whiteboard
assignees: ""
---

## Board

Which board is this for?

## Page

Link to the page where you want this feature.

## Short summary

Keep the title short, then explain the feature request below.

## What do you want

Describe the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Why would it help

Explain the problem this would solve or the workflow it would improve.

## Example workflow

Add a short example of how you would use it.

## Notes

- If a similar feature request already exists, update that issue instead of opening a duplicate.
- Feature requests are reviewed before they appear on the live site.
